query:
INSERT INTO positions (name, displayName) VALUES ('Servis', 'Servis');

INSERT INTO position_categories (positionId, name) VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'Görev Bilinci'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'İletişim Becerisi'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'Analitik Düşünme ve Problem Çözme'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'Kalite Odaklılık'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'Takım Çalışması ve İşbirliği'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'Müşteri Odaklılık'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'Planlama ve Organize Etme'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'Ticari Bakış'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'İş Disiplini ve Tutum'),
((SELECT id FROM positions WHERE name = 'Servis'), 'Servis');
